assertions.title: Checkpoint save captures mission execution state

steps.action: Create mission with plan.json (m1, m2 milestones, f1, f2 features)
steps.observed: Mission created: ID 2026-03-30-003, title 'Checkpoint Test Mission', status 'draft'
Mission approved, then updated to status 'executing'

steps.action: Update feature f1 status to in_progress

steps.expected: Checkpoint saved with current feature states
steps.observed: Checkpoint saved: 20260330-025012-981 with 2 features and 1 assertion captured

steps.expected: Contains missionId, milestoneId, featureStates (f1: in_progress, f2: pending), assertionStates
steps.observed: Checkpoint file contains: missionId '2026-03-30-003', milestoneId 'm1', featureStates with f1:'in_progress', f2:'pending', assertionStates with 'f1-assertion-1':'pending'

evidence.stdout:
[ok] Checkpoint saved: 20260330-025012-981
  Mission: 2026-03-30-003
  Milestone: m1
  Timestamp: 2026-03-29T19:50:12.981Z
  Features captured: 2
  Assertions captured: 1

assertions.title: Checkpoint load/list returns latest-first metadata history

steps.action: Update feature f1 to in_review status

steps.expected: Second checkpoint created with updated feature state

steps.observed: List shows 2 checkpoints: 20260330-025032-895 (newest) first, then 20260330-025012-981. 'newest first' explicitly stated in output.

steps.expected: Returns latest checkpoint with metadata-only warning
steps.observed: Latest checkpoint loaded: 20260330-025032-895 (the newest one). WARNING message clearly states 'Checkpoints restore metadata only (mission state, feature statuses, assertion results). Filesystem changes and git state are NOT restored'

evidence.listStdout:
Mission: Checkpoint Test Mission (2026-03-30-003)

2 checkpoint(s) (newest first):

20260330-025032-895
  Milestone: m1
  Time: 3/30/2026, 2:50:32 AM
  Features: 2, Assertions: 1

20260330-025012-981
  Milestone: m1
  Time: 3/30/2026, 2:50:12 AM
  Features: 2, Assertions: 1
evidence.loadStdout:
[ok] Latest checkpoint loaded: 20260330-025032-895
  Mission: 2026-03-30-003
  Milestone: m1
  Timestamp: 2026-03-29T19:50:32.895Z
  Features captured: 2
  Assertions captured: 1

[!] WARNING: Checkpoints restore metadata only (mission state, feature statuses, assertion results). Filesystem changes and git state are NOT restored by checkpoint load. To restore code state, checkout the corresponding git commit if available.

frictions.description: Feature status transition from in_progress -> completed is invalid; must go through in_review first. This is expected domain behavior but could be documented better in user-testing.md
frictions.resolution: Used valid transition: in_progress -> in_review instead

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. Checkpoint save captures mission execution state with feature and assertion states. Checkpoint list returns newest-first order. Checkpoint load returns latest checkpoint with clear metadata-only restore warning.
